mission.title: sops: Piping using `/dev/stdin` doesn't work on Windows
mission.description: Piping using `/dev/stdin` doesn't work on Windows. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current sops setup
steps.description:
Verify your sops version and configuration:
```bash
sops --version
```
This feature requires sops v3.7.0+ which supports `-` for stdin input.

steps.title: Review sops configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant sops configuration:
The "workaround" to get piping to work is not cross-platform.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Piping using `/dev/stdin` doesn't work on Windows
steps.description:
The fix allows using `-` as a cross-platform alternative to `/dev/stdin` for reading data from stdin.

Example usage:
```bash
# Decrypt from stdin using - (cross-platform)
cat secrets.yaml | sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -

# This replaces the non-portable /dev/stdin approach
# OLD (Linux only): cat secrets.yaml | sops -d /dev/stdin
# NEW (cross-platform): cat secrets.yaml | sops -d -
```

See the fix PR for details: https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1104

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that stdin piping works correctly with the `-` argument:
```bash
# Encrypt a test file
sops -e test.yaml > test.enc.yaml

# Decrypt via stdin using -
cat test.enc.yaml | sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -

# Verify output matches original
diff <(cat test.yaml) <(cat test.enc.yaml | sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -)
```
Confirm this works on both Linux and Windows/WSL environments.

resolution.summary:
Allow `-` as cross platform alternative to `/dev/stdin` for reading data from STDIN.

```
% cat secrets.yaml | ~/go/src/go.mozilla.org/sops/cmd/sops/sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -
podAnnotations:
    secret: value
% ~/go/src/go.mozilla.org/sops/cmd/sops/sops -d secrets.yaml
podAnnotations:
    secret: value
```
codeSnippets:
% cat secrets.yaml | ~/go/src/go.mozilla.org/sops/cmd/sops/sops --input-type yaml --output-type yaml -d -
podAnnotations:
    secret: value
% ~/go/src/go.mozilla.org/sops/cmd/sops/sops -d secrets.yaml
podAnnotations:
    secret: value

sops --decrypt --input-type yaml --output-type yaml --output /cygdrive/c/Users/RUNNER~1/AppData/Local/Temp/tmp.6bAckDpOVi/assets/values/sops/secrets.yaml.dec /cygdrive/c/Users/RUNNER~1/AppData/Local/Temp/tmp.6bAckDpOVi/assets/values/sops/secrets.yaml
#   Error: cannot operate on non-existent file

prerequisites.description: A working sops installation or development environment.
